content:
> For every Keyflare Clementine has, she gets 0.35 Crit Rate and Crit Dmg.

The conversion is only shown when you enter a stage so for precision, enter a stage and click on Clementine's profile for her true Crit Rate and Crit Dmg so you know what you're working with.
thread_title: Clementine In-depth Guide and Build By Spooky | UID 101094561 [V2.5 UGC Contest]

content: Which are good all e0 teams. New player here and I am planning to pull e0 pf all charcters

That kind of "good" team with all e0 doesnt exist tbh. You will suffer a lot and think maybe I should pull a dupe.
The only team that capable of doing that I can think of is E0 Saya + E0Vortice  but with some invested standard support unit

Low E good team does exist.

I do not encourage to pull a ton of various E0 because at the end of the day you will have a lot of handicap character and progress very slowly.

I am planning to use lotan oe as she can do a lot I heard. And using the free dupe per month maybe get few units up

Already have e1 pollux and e1 gmurphy.

content: you might want to eventually read some of the side stories not listed since i did leave a few out, but this list is primarily aiming to minimise the time required to unlock for understanding 95% of the main story

After you understand the main story you can finally get around to things that really matter, like Agrippa raiding ||the fridge||

Truly appreciate this list. I found it after ch7 so just in time for holding off a bit until I could get gramona, beyond the skies and sorel's stories done <:wahoo:1323984885320519680> 

I had just been unlocking them in the handbook order aside for knowing to wait with salvador's until after ch6 <:CB_giggle:553556392334589973>
